record_types.name: Obstacle_Distance_3D

fields.name: Sensor_Type
fields.description: Class id of the distance sensor type.

fields.name: Obstacle_Id
fields.description:
Unique ID given to each obstacle so that its movement can be
tracked. Use UINT16_MAX if object ID is unknown or cannot be
determined.

fields.name: X
fields.description:
Units: [m]
X position of the obstacle.

fields.name: Y
fields.description:
Units: [m]
Y position of the obstacle.

fields.name: Z
fields.description:
Units: [m]
Z position of the obstacle.

fields.name: Min_Distance
fields.description:
Units: [m]
Minimum distance the sensor can measure.

fields.name: Max_Distance
fields.description:
Units: [m]
Maximum distance the sensor can measure.
